name: multiplayer-music-quiz
description: Multiplayer music quiz game with Socket.IO and real-time gameplay

scripts.dev: npm run preflight:node && node esbuild.config.js && nodemon --watch src/ --ext js,html,css -x "node esbuild.config.js && node src/server/index.js"
scripts.dev:server: npm run preflight:node && nodemon src/server/index.js --watch src/server/
scripts.test: npm run preflight:node && npx playwright test
scripts.test:ui: npm run preflight:node && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:headed: npm run preflight:node && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:debug: npm run preflight:node && npx playwright test --debug
scripts.test:electron: npm run preflight:electron && npx playwright test tests/electron-*.spec.js --config=playwright.electron.config.js
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run preflight:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run preflight:electron && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && npm run preflight:electron && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run build && npm run preflight:electron && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && npm run preflight:electron && electron-builder --linux
